channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: June 1 trial date set for Venezuela’s Nicolás Maduro in his US drug trafficking case
item.description: A June 1 trial date has been set for Nicolás Maduro to face drug trafficking charges in New York. The trial date was set on Wednesday during a brief hearing in Manhattan federal court.

item.title: ‘The last picture': A passing boater’s photograph may be the 5 adults who drowned in Ohio
Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall on southern Louisiana with threatening winds
